productDisplayName: Puma Men Track Black Ferrari Jacket
description: CompositionBlack track jacket made of 100% polyester, has ribbed spread mock collar, ribbed cuffs and hemline, full zipper closure, long sleeves with contoured panels, brand logo embroidered on the left sleeve cuff, brand name printed on the centre back, two insert pockets on the sides on the front, Scudera ferrari badge on the left chest and green, white and red piping on the right shoulderFittingRegularWash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water Do not bleach Tumble dry at low temperature Cool iron Do not dry clean Take training to the next level with this Scudera Ferrari training jacket from puma. The long sleeves, contoured panels and ribbed hemline, collar and cuffs, all ensure a snug Fit. The Scudera Ferrari badge and the green, white and red piping over the right shoulder gives this jacket a winning edge. Team this with track pants or jeans and performance footwear from the wide collection available at myntra for work outs or casual occassions.Model StatisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-19"
